name: Backpack
description:
HERMES CANVAS BACKPACK

This is a canvas and leather trimmed Polochon Mimil backpack made by Hermès. It is made in a 100% cotton red canvas with leather cord straps and trim. The bag is in good condition. There is no vintage smell and the interior is clean aside from a couple of small stains (see photo). The exterior is also in good condition. There are a few light stains and some light fading near the upper seams (see photo). All of the stitching is in great condition. The leather cords are very stable and have not stiffened. Made in France. There is non-Hermes dust bag included for storage. Offers are highly encouraged. Thank you for looking.

MEASUREMENTS
9.5" WIDE
15" TALL
